# Bounty Reality Check

Agent-paid bounty due-diligence scans. Use this when an autonomous agent/operator needs to decide whether a public bounty/listing is worth building for.

Order flow:
1. Read /.well-known/agent-pay.json
2. Choose quick-scan ($5), deep-scan ($25), or weekly-shortlist ($99).
3. Pay Solana USDC or EVM/BSC stablecoin to the listed address.
4. Open https://github.com/tolga-tom-nook/bounty-reality-check/issues/new/choose with tier, listing URL, payment rail, and tx hash.
5. Hermes posts the report back to the issue.

Boundaries: no custody, trading, wallet signing, gambling, fake engagement, or payment guarantees.
